content:
The Site…? Yes.
I write technical articles on Zenn, so this is a place for everything that doesn’t belong there.
QUIET QUALIA That’s the name of the site.
There’s probably no deep meaning behind it. Maybe.
How Was It Built? Hugo + PaperMod
Hugo is great because it’s easy to customize. And if you get stuck, you can just ask an AI.
Main Customizations (Notes) Hatena Bookmark share button Zenn-style author block (below articles) Author icon I think that’s about it…?
Deployment ブログつくってて
ローカル→GitHub→GitHub Action→ホスティングサーバー
と思ったけど、GitHub Action書きたくないので
ローカル→GitHub &&
ローカル→SSH→ホスティングサーバーからgit pull
をdeploy\.shに書いて自動化でよさげ
GitHub経由する意味があまりないのは気のせいなはず
— びーぐる (@beagle_dog_inu) November 24, 2025 There’s a non-zero chance I might migrate servers, so having it on GitHub is definitely the right call.
Future Plans Create an About page Create a Projects page Adjust fonts and line spacing
summary:
The Site…?

Yes.
I write technical articles on Zenn, so this is a place for everything that doesn’t belong there.

QUIET QUALIA

That’s the name of the site.
There’s probably no deep meaning behind it. Maybe.

How Was It Built?

Hugo + PaperMod
Hugo is great because it’s easy to customize. And if you get stuck, you can just ask an AI.

Main Customizations (Notes)

  • Hatena Bookmark share button
  • Zenn-style author block (below articles)
  • Author icon

I think that’s about it…?
title: The Site

content:
Last Updated: 2026-02-27
Me Name Beagle
Real Name Shoji Fujiwara
Overview AI Enthusiast
Freelance Software Engineer
Tech Writer, Indie Developer
Based in Saitama, Japan — born in Sapporo
Contact X: @beagle_dog_inu GitHub: beagleworks Zenn: beagle Career / Work Business Name Beagle Works
Career Working as a freelancer since university
Skill Set Development & Operations Technology selection & architecture design General software development Full-stack web application development System operations, maintenance & security AI Planning & developing LLM-powered applications Development with coding agents & organizational adoption AI adoption support, promotion & training for organizations Management & Business Engineering management Product management (apprentice) Writing & Speaking Writing tech books & articles Speaking at AI-related events (LTs, 15-min sessions, talks) Current Interests Research on SDD (Spec-Driven Development) Keeping up with Claude Code and Codex Indie development (mostly for personal use) Writing technical articles Networking at offline events & meetups Certifications Network Specialist Information Security Management Examination (registered 2017–2023) Work History Development & operations of event production web applications (2014–2026?) Support for transitioning to fully remote work environments (2020) PoC development with LLMs, planning & development of LLM-based productivity apps (2024, 2025) New development of business applications (multiple) Website creation, operations & maintenance (multiple) Tech book writing (published in Software Design, February 2026 issue) …and more. Some can be shared publicly — may introduce them later.
Personal Hobbies I don’t have that many hobbies, which makes it awkward when asked
Keeping up with IT technology Writing Programming (AtCoder blue rated) PC building Collecting small figures (Dragon Quest monster mini figures, etc.) Shogi (casual player) Watching horse racing (as a sport, not gambling) Family Wife, two daughters
Fun Facts I know plenty of great spots in Hokkaido, so feel free to ask when planning a trip!
(Though things have changed so much lately that I’m losing confidence…)
Currently on a 5-event losing streak for speaking opportunities (3 event cancellations, 2 lottery losses)
For work, writing, or speaking inquiries, please reach out via X DMs.
title: About

content:
This Privacy Policy describes how personal information is handled on this website (QUIET QUALIA).
Operator Information Site Name: QUIET QUALIA Operator: Beagle (Beagle Works) URL: https://blog.beagleworks.net Collection of Personal Information This website does not have contact forms or comment features, and does not directly collect personal information from visitors.
Additionally, no analytics tools (such as Google Analytics) are used.
Amazon Associates Program This site is a participant in the Amazon Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn referral fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.co.jp.
Product links in articles on this site may include Amazon Associates links. If you purchase a product through these links, this site may receive a referral fee, but no additional cost is incurred by the purchaser.
Cookies This website itself does not use cookies; however, the Amazon Associates Program may cause cookies to be used on Amazon’s side.
Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when you visit a website. Amazon uses cookies to track visitor activity, display relevant advertisements, and calculate referral fees.
If you do not wish to use cookies, you can disable them in your browser settings. However, some features may not function properly in that case.
Disclaimer While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of information published on this site, we do not guarantee its content.
The operator assumes no responsibility for any damages arising from the use of information on this site.
The operator assumes no responsibility for information or services provided on sites accessed through links or banners on this site.
Contact For inquiries about this site, please contact us through the following social media account:
X (Twitter): @beagle_dog_inu Changes to This Privacy Policy This site may modify this Privacy Policy as necessary. The updated Privacy Policy shall take effect upon publication on this page.
Established: November 1, 2025
title: Privacy Policy
